author: jochembrouwer
content:
Merged. Next step is to get deterministic/verifiable benchmarks (up to some extend as there is always some random noise in hardware/software) up for these tests for clients with BALs activated. Especially the difference between the batch IO / no batch IO flags enabled to see the effect of this. This is done on isolated EL clients on top of perf-devnet-3 / bloatnet (a fork of mainnet a while ago) which has deployed specific contracts (and also bloated those with specific storage) targeted by these benchmarks.
This is super interesting and also last step to finalize the BAL spec (batch IO), so this is urgent and we are working hard on this 💪 😄
